description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and featuring a well-maintained front lawn with a pathway leading to the main entrance. The house has a gable roof with a combination of light gray and white exterior walls, and a prominent front porch supported by columns. Large windows are distributed across the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. A driveway leads to an attached garage on the right side, while flower beds and shrubs add greenery to the facade. The backyard is spacious and open, bordered by the same hedge, and the overall design is clean and modern with subtle traditional elements.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, attached garage, and surrounding hedge, featuring large windows and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, flower beds, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the hedge boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backyard, rear windows, and the continuous hedge.
description_view_3: Left-side view with side windows, garden path, and dense shrubbery near the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
